caption: A man with short graying hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit jacket and white shirt, is centered in a headshot against a white background. The image is framed by a blurred version of himself on both the left and right sides. A colorful logo with the text "plus tv" appears in the upper left corner of each shot. Below the man, a purple banner reads "PLUS POLITICS," and a larger white text overlay states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Across the sequence, the man remains still with a neutral expression, looking directly forward. The lower portion of the screen displays varying information: the first shot lists "WATCH ON" alongside the "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" logos; the second shows "WATCH ONLINE" followed by "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV"; and the final shots display "SUBSCRIBE" with "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE."
